title: The Data Science Agent can now also use models served through Anthropic on Databricks
body: The Databricks Assistant can now also use models served through Anthropic on Databricks as part of the [Data Science Agent](/aws/en/notebooks/ds-agent) when [partner-powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks-ai/partner-powered) are enabled. Anthropic on Databricks uses endpoints hosted by Databricks within the Databricks security perimeter.
